ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "tract_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the census tract */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State identifier */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* County identifier */,
  "tract_number" INTEGER /* Tract number within the county */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Age group identifier */,
  "nq_x" REAL /* Count of individuals in the age group */,
  "l_x" INTEGER /* Population estimate for the tract */,
  "nd_x" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the age group */,
  "nL_x" INTEGER /* Population at risk */,
  "T_x" INTEGER /* Total population in the tract */,
  "e_x" REAL /* Estimate of health event rate */,
  "se_nq_x" REAL /* Standard error for nq_x */,
  "se_e_x" REAL /* Standard error for e_x */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Health measure identifier */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_id", "age_group_id", "measure_id", "year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state is located in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county is located in */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the health measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the measure represents */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the health measure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, public health official) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tract_id" TEXT /* ID of the tract being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tract data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tract data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
